x:c.x:v: Build Notes for Hannah
Purpose
Use the Portal Product Database tab as the working source of truth for private portal formulation tables, search, filters and category pages.
Important Build Logic
The portal should be a secure clinical resource area for approved healthcare professionals. It should not be styled or labelled like a retail product grid.
Use table-style formulation listings, not Shopify product cards where possible.
The primary action should be Submit Prescription or Contact Pharmacy Team, not Add to Cart or Checkout.
Access Workflow
1. Practitioner submits access application.
2. Novecy/Abi manually reviews the application.
3. Approved user is created or tagged as approved.
4. Approved practitioner logs in and accesses restricted portal content.
Product Tagging
Use Primary Clinical Category for the main category page.
Use Secondary Clinical Categories and Clinical Category Tags for cross-listing and search.
Use Dosage Form Filter for the technical filter options.
Search Requirements
Search should support Product / Ingredient, Full Formulation Description, Dosage Form, Clinical Category Tags, Search Keywords and Practitioner Speciality Tags.
Language To Use
Submit Prescription; Request Formulation Support; Contact Pharmacy Team; View Formulations & Indicative Pricing; View Details.
Language To Avoid
Add to cart; Buy now; Checkout; Continue shopping.
Source
Rows were extracted from NOVECY_PricingGuide.pdf and include source page references for checking.
